mapper.insert:
SELECT nextval('CSTM_LINE_BM_SQN_SEQ')::text
INSERT INTO CUSTOM_LINE_BOOKMARK( CSTM_LINE_BM_SQN, USER_ID, CSTM_LINE_BM_NM, ATRZ_LINE_SEQ, ATRZ_APPR_ID, APPR_ATRZ_YN ) VALUES ( #{cstmLineBmSqn}, #{userId}, #{cstmLineBmNm}, #{atrzLineSeq}, #{atrzApprId}, #{apprAtrzYn} )
mapper.select: SELECT b.CSTM_LINE_BM_SQN, b.USER_ID, b.CSTM_LINE_BM_NM, b.ATRZ_LINE_SEQ, b.ATRZ_APPR_ID, b.APPR_ATRZ_YN, u.USER_NM AS userNm, d.DEPT_NM AS deptNm, j.JBGD_NM AS jbgdNm, f.FILE_PATH FROM CUSTOM_LINE_BOOKMARK b JOIN USERS u ON b.ATRZ_APPR_ID = u.USER_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON u.DEPT_ID = d.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN JOB_GRADE j ON u.JBGD_CD = j.JBGD_CD LEFT JOIN FILE_DETAIL f ON u.USER_IMG_FILE_ID = f.FILE_ID WHERE b.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY b.CSTM_LINE_BM_NM, b.ATRZ_LINE_SEQ
